findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-001-direct-git-url-ref-reaches-simple-git-clone/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-001-direct-git-url-ref-reaches-simple-git-clone/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer ran the real CLI with an ext:: direct-git source under an isolated HOME that enabled protocol.ext; native git executed the helper and wrote uid/gid to confirm-impact.log before clone failure.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-002-symlink-dereference-copies-out-of-tree-files/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-002-symlink-dereference-copies-out-of-tree-files/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer installed a skill source containing a symlink to an out-of-tree secret in copy mode; the installed artifact was a regular file containing the secret marker.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-009-project-scope-symlinked-agent-base-escape/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-009-project-scope-symlinked-agent-base-escape/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer installed project-scoped into a checkout whose .agents was a symlink; realpath of the lexical project install landed under the outside target.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-010-experimental-install-unlocked-node-modules-skills/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-010-experimental-install-unlocked-node-modules-skills/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer ran the real CLI experimental_install with a lockfile listing only safe-locked-skill; an unlisted transitive-evil-package skill was installed and added to skills-lock.json.
MITM marker persisted in installed SKILL.md and auxiliary file during V4 live PoC. V5 did not generate a test because V4 already had live confirmation.
V4 live PoC observed CLI hang on never-ending well-known SKILL.md response. V5 did not generate a test because V4 already had live confirmation.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-005-duplicate-skill-name-first-wins/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-005-duplicate-skill-name-first-wins/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer created duplicate trusted-build skills in attacker and curated paths; discover/install surfaced one candidate from the attacker path and installed the attacker marker.
V4 live PoC observed attacker marker installed from substituted blob snapshot. V5 did not generate a test because V4 already had live confirmation.
V4 live PoC observed path-local evil-shadow skill installed over origin-root metadata. V5 did not generate a test because V4 already had live confirmation.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p10-008-agent-skill-name-constraints-not-enforced/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p10-008-agent-skill-name-constraints-not-enforced/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer parsed name ../trusted-skill, installed it after a legitimate trusted-skill, and observed the sanitized destination overwrite with attacker content.
V4 live PoC observed attacker marker installed from cleartext HTTP git clone. V5 did not generate a test because V4 already had live confirmation.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p12-node-modules-sync-duplicate-name-overwrite/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p12-node-modules-sync-duplicate-name-overwrite/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer ran the real CLI experimental_sync over two node_modules skills with name shared-name; final .agents/skills/shared-name and lock provenance came from zzz-malicious.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p12-project-scope-remove-symlinked-agent-base-escape/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p12-project-scope-remove-symlinked-agent-base-escape/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer ran the real CLI remove in a project whose .agents symlink pointed outside; the outside victim-skill directory existed before and was deleted after the project-scoped command.

findings.command: PIGOLIUM_SESSION_UUID=c44d2b43-8b4d-48e7-ae92-850980bd6884 PIGOLIUM_CONNECTION=piolium/confirm-workspace/env-connection.json timeout 90 pnpm exec vitest run piolium/findings/p12-unbounded-git-local-frontmatter-parse/confirm-test.test.ts --testTimeout=60000 --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tee piolium/findings/p12-unbounded-git-local-frontmatter-parse/evidence/confirm-test-output.log
findings.notes: Vitest reproducer ran the real CLI against a local SKILL.md with 500k frontmatter keys under NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=32; the child process aborted with V8 heap out-of-memory stack trace.
